package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_database_access_transaction_per_row_bulk_write: Layer: Database access. Flag bulk writes that open and commit one transaction per row.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule528PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario528Positive(records []Rule528PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
